svg.title: BloxStock real-time update flow: Cron → Worker → KV → Client polling
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full data path from Cloudflare cron trigger through Worker fetch, KV write, and client polling with fast/slow poll stages.

g.text: A cache:no-store ≠ bypass CDN edge cache
B loadStock() + tickCountdown() có thể gọi
